blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 27 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,151 ft. Looking ahead, 41 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder. Models disagree — check back.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 19.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 16" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
